rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE DOBOSIEWICZ LIVING TRUST UNDER DECLARATION OF TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 29, 2009
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Todor Tabakov To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents And Tangible Things Described In Deposition Notice And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Todor Tabakov
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling: Motion is granted. The request for sanctions is denied.
